parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id AS prospect_id,
  p.email,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.company,
  p.title,
  p.sector,
  p.lead_score,
  COALESCE(ct_sector.topic, ct_general.topic) AS topic,
  COALESCE(ct_sector.angle, ct_general.angle) AS angle,
  COALESCE(ct_sector.id, ct_general.id) AS topic_id
FROM v_campaign_eligible p
LEFT JOIN campaign_topics ct_sector
  ON ct_sector.day_slot = $1
  AND ct_sector.sector = p.sector
  AND ct_sector.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN campaign_topics ct_general
  ON ct_general.day_slot = $1
  AND ct_general.sector = 'general'
  AND ct_general.is_active = true
WHERE COALESCE(ct_sector.topic, ct_general.topic) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.lead_score DESC
LIMIT 100;

INSERT INTO email_log (prospect_id, topic_id, subject, status, sent_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'sent', NOW());

UPDATE prospects
SET
  last_email_at = NOW(),
  emails_sent   = COALESCE(emails_sent, 0) + 1,
  sequence_step = COALESCE(sequence_step, 0) + 1,
  updated_at    = NOW()
WHERE id = $1;
